game_name: Dragon Quest V: Hand of the Heavenly Bride

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this RPG title

special_mechanics.name: Monster Recruitment
special_mechanics.description: Monsters from random encounters can join the player's party after battles. Monsters level up like human characters. Total of 40 recruitable monsters in SFC version, 71 in PS2 remake.

special_mechanics.name: Wagon System
special_mechanics.description: Party members can rest in a wagon while exploring the overworld. Party management feature carried forward from Dragon Quest IV.

tier_notes: Dragon Quest V is an RPG with turn-based mechanics and overworld exploration. Available sources contain no quantitative movement physics data, jump parameters, gravity values, or sub-pixel system information. Game focuses on party mechanics, monster recruitment, and narrative rather than precise platforming physics. Tier 2 classification appropriate due to lack of technical physics documentation in public sources.
sources_used: speedrun.com - Dragon Quest V (SNES) leaderboards page
